posts.author: JonathanUttley (Jonathan Uttley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add the option to disable the AI Notetaker camera by default in meetings

What are you trying to achieve

Currently, we have to disable the camera for the notetaker participant in the meeting to achieve this. Ideally, I’d like the option to disable this in Monday.com, so it joins with the camera disabled.

I’m a fan of the Llama but this could come across unprofessional with specific clients.
